summary: Execution log demonstrating autonomous operation of CrawDaddy Security. Agent diagnosed and self-repaired a 9-day outage, implemented x402 autonomous payments, and completed end-to-end job execution with zero human intervention.

key_decisions.finding: Stale API key in config.json caused 9-day outage
x402 EIP-712 payment signing added to token_contract_scan
Full autonomous job cycle completed — Butler hired CrawDaddy, scan delivered, payment settled on-chain
